title: Teaching the foundations of AI in the classroom
summary: Experience AI is a free educational program from Google DeepMind and the Raspberry Pi Foundation designed to teach AI and machine learning foundations to school-aged students. The program provides research-backed lessons, videos, worksheets, and teacher training to support educators in teaching responsible AI, and has reached over 165 countries.
